description: Unify Lead Create/Edit Form - Create page (leads/(list)/new/page.tsx, 1029 lines) and Edit page (leads/[id]/edit/page.tsx, 464 lines) share no components. Issues: different API clients (trpc vs api), different field sets (BANT only in create but silently dropped), different styling, different validation, no auth guard on create. Fix: extract shared LeadForm component, unify API client, include all fields in both views, consistent styling.

code_reduction.actual: 18.7% (1980 -> 1609 clean prettier-compliant). Full duplication eliminated via shared LeadForm. 30% NOT reached at acceptable quality: it would require dropping the 3-step create wizard (UX change + ~26 test rewrites) which the approved spec/Plan-Reviewer deliberately kept. Owner approved shipping the wizard-preserving unification (soft KPI, not a binary gate).

no_dropped_fields.actual: BANT (budget/authority/need/timeline) + annualRevenue persisted + round-trip in BOTH create and edit; no field silently dropped (IFC-242 first-class behaviour preserved).

test_coverage.actual: LeadForm.tsx + change-tracker + lead-form-utils well-covered; 130 lead tests + full web suite (10821) green; diff-coverage >=80%.

notes: Wiring debt: Create and Edit lead pages share no components, have inconsistent behavior.
